title: Luffy Keeps Moving Toward God
description: Enel’s power and authority become clearer as Skypiea’s people and warriors are forced to live under his judgment.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, 19, 22, this scene centers on Enel, Wyper, Shandia warrior, Gan Fall, Luffy. Enel’s power and authority become clearer as Skypiea’s people and warriors are forced to live under his judgment.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: I'm back to where we were but...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: nobody is here. Did I get lost...?

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Ah well... they'll be fine by themselves.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: They got lost, did they? Kids!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!!!!!!!!! mates!!!! the adventure is still alive!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Let's get it on!!! ug pirate band!!!!

summary: Enel’s power and authority become clearer as Skypiea’s people and warriors are forced to live under his judgment.
